PLAINTIFFS OPPOSITION TO SPECIALLY APPEARING INTERVENOR FIREMANS FUND INSURANCE COMPANY ON BEHALF OF ITS SUSPENDED INSURED, DEFENDANT ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA, INC.S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 59163973) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALDWIN, JOHN BALDWIN, MARY

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, INTERVENOR FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. FIREMAN'S FUND IS ALLOWED TO BRING SAID MOTION. (SEE WESTERN HERITAGE INS. CO. V. SUPERIOR COURT (2011) 199 CAL.APP.4TH 1196.) THE DEFAULT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA ON SEPTEMBER 21, 2012 IS SET ASIDE PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S INHERENT, EQUITABLE POWER TO SET ASIDE A DEFAULT ON THE GROUND OF EXTRINSIC FRAUD OR MISTAKE. THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA ON DECEMBER 8, 2015 IS SET ASIDE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 473(B) AND PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S INHERENT, EQUITABLE POWER TO SET ASIDE A DEFAULT JUDGMENT ON THE GROUND OF EXTRINSIC FRAUD OR MISTAKE. PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: MICHELE LUCAS, CSR 4017 (AIKEN WELCH, 510.451.1580)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: INTERVENOR FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Appearances: Michael D. Levinson of Brayton Purcell, LLP (415.898.1555) for plaintiff and opposing party; Richard Lee of Selman Breitman (415.979.2006) for intervenor and moving party Fireman's Fund Insurance Company.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's motion to set aside entry of default and default judgment is granted. Fireman's Fund is allowed to bring said motion. (See Western Heritage Ins. Co. v. Superior Court (2011) 199 Cal.App.4th 1196.) The default entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on September 21, 2012 is set aside pursuant to the court's inherent, equitable power to set aside a default on the ground of extrinsic fraud or mistake. The default judgment entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on December 8, 2015 is set aside pursuant to C.C.P. 473(b) and pursuant to the court's inherent, equitable power to set aside a default judgment on the ground of extrinsic fraud or mistake. Plaintiffs' request for a continuance is denied. Order signed. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Michele Lucas, CSR 4017 (Aiken Welch, 510.451.1580) (503/GLW)

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Associated Insulation Of California
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon , CSR#6840.

Emerald S. Law, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, JOHN BALDWIN and MARY BALDWIN, "plaintiffs").
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA in the amounts: As to Plailntiff JOHN BALDWIN, $122,000.00 in Economic Damages, $500,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, and as to Plaintiff MARY BALDWIN, $300,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, for a combined total amount of $922,000.00
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
